scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build: npm run build -w @itharbors/plugin-types && npm run build -w @itharbors/sqlite-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/mysql-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-cli && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run plugins:build
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/gateway && npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client && npm run test -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-cli && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-sqlite && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-mysql && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-notifications && node --test scripts/lib/kit-path.test.mjs scripts/lib/ci-workflow.test.mjs scripts/lib/plugin-namespace.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-catalog.test.mjs scripts/lib/workspace-store.test.mjs scripts/lib/electron-launcher.test.mjs scripts/lib/application-runtime-client.test.mjs scripts/lib/codex-skill-resource.test.mjs scripts/lib/notification-host.test.mjs scripts/lib/notification-desktop.test.mjs scripts/lib/runtime-ports.test.mjs scripts/lib/npm-spawn.test.mjs scripts/lib/framework-runtime.test.mjs scripts/lib/plugin-build/scripts.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-store/state.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-store/startup.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-store/archive.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-store/installer.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/cache.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/client.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/resolver.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/github-release-fetch.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/github-attestation.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/downloader.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/audit.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/manager.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-registry/acceptance.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-service.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-ipc.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-preload.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-view.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-window.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-manager-acceptance.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-docs.test.mjs .agents/skills/notify-user/tests/notify.test.mjs && npm run test:kit-check && npm run test:kit-publish && npm run test:change-workflow && npm run test:kit-workflow && npm run test:kit-monorepo && npm run test:kit-ci-selection
scripts.kill: lsof -ti:49380 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:49381 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:49382 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'development ports cleared'
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run plugins:check
